nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞角鵰
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞角鵰（Papuan eagle，学名 Harpyopsis novaeguineae），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括热带雨林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Cornell Lab of Ornithology, Ithaca, NY, USA. The main native habitat inhabited by Papuan eagles are undisturbed tropical rainforests. However, they will also utilize gallery forests, monsoon scrub forest and dry woodland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: University of Papua New Guinea, Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. The Papuan eagle is probably naturally scarce, but it is under the threat of habitat destruction by deforestation, as well as hunting

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: University of Papua New Guinea, Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. The Papuan eagle is probably naturally scarce, but it is under the threat of habitat destruction by deforestation, as well as hunting

links.evidence: University of Papua New Guinea, Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. The Papuan eagle is probably naturally scarce, but it is under the threat of habitat destruction by deforestation, as well as hunting
